policies.title: scheduling
policies.text: lessons are scheduled via the online booking system. please book at least 24 hours in advance.

policies.title: payments & invoicing
policies.text: payment is due at the time of booking. invoices are sent via wave for package purchases.

policies.title: cancellations
policies.text: cancellations require 24-hour notice. late cancellations or no-shows may be charged the full lesson rate.
